_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: SA-MP
author: tridentsky@pelican.io
description: SA-MP 0.3.7 server with optional UDP voice proxy for SampVoice. The proxy automatically detects internal voice ports and forwards them to the panel-assigned port.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y -qq curl wget ca-certificates tar file >/dev/null 2>&1

VERSION="0.3.7"

cd /tmp
DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS=false

MIRRORS=(
    "https://sampcenter.com/download/server/linux/${VERSION}.tar.gz"
    "https://github.com/KrustyKoyle/files.sa-mp.com-Archive/raw/main/samp037svr_R2-1.tar.gz"
    "https://sa-mp.im/samp037svr_R2-1.tar.gz"
)

for mirror in "${MIRRORS[@]}"; do
    if curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 120 -o samp.tar.gz "$mirror" 2>/dev/null; then
        DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS=true
        break
    fi
done

if [ "$DOWNLOAD_SUCCESS" != "true" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Could not download SA-MP server"
    exit 1
fi

mkdir -p /mnt/server
tar -xzf samp.tar.gz --strip-components=1 -C /mnt/server/
cd /mnt/server

if [ -n "$SAMPVOICE_URL" ] && [ "$SAMPVOICE_URL" != "none" ]; then
    mkdir -p plugins
    cd /tmp
    rm -f sv_download 2>/dev/null
    if curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 120 -o sv_download "$SAMPVOICE_URL" 2>/dev/null; then
        FTYPE=$(file -b sv_download)
        case "$FTYPE" in
            *gzip*|*tar*)
                mkdir -p /tmp/sv_extract
                tar -xzf sv_download -C /tmp/sv_extract 2>/dev/null
                SV_SO=$(find /tmp/sv_extract -name "sampvoice.so" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)
                if [ -n "$SV_SO" ]; then
                    cp "$SV_SO" /mnt/server/plugins/sampvoice.so
                fi
                rm -rf /tmp/sv_extract
                ;;
            *ELF*)
                cp sv_download /mnt/server/plugins/sampvoice.so
                ;;
        esac
    fi
    cd /mnt/server
    if [ -f "plugins/sampvoice.so" ]; then
        if grep -q "^plugins" server.cfg; then
            sed -i 's/^plugins\s*\(.*\)/plugins \1 sampvoice/' server.cfg
        else
            echo "plugins sampvoice" >> server.cfg
        fi
    fi
fi

if [ "${INSTALL_MYSQL}" = "1" ] || [ "${INSTALL_MYSQL}" = "true" ]; then
    mkdir -p plugins
    cd /tmp
    MYSQL_URLS=(
        "https://github.com/pBlueG/SA-MP-MySQL/releases/download/R41-4/mysql-R41-4-linux.tar.gz"
        "https://github.com/pBlueG/SA-MP-MySQL/releases/download/R41-3/mysql-R41-3-linux.tar.gz"
    )
    for url in "${MYSQL_URLS[@]}"; do
        if curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 60 -o mysql.tar.gz "$url" 2>/dev/null; then
            mkdir -p /tmp/mysql_extract
            tar -xzf mysql.tar.gz -C /tmp/mysql_extract 2>/dev/null
            MYSQL_SO=$(find /tmp/mysql_extract -name "mysql.so" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)
            if [ -z "$MYSQL_SO" ]; then
                MYSQL_SO=$(find /tmp/mysql_extract -name "mysql_static.so" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1)
            fi
            if [ -n "$MYSQL_SO" ]; then
                cp "$MYSQL_SO" /mnt/server/plugins/mysql.so
                cd /mnt/server
                if grep -q "^plugins" server.cfg; then
                    sed -i 's/^plugins\s*\(.*\)/plugins \1 mysql/' server.cfg
                else
                    echo "plugins mysql" >> server.cfg
                fi
                break
            fi
            rm -rf /tmp/mysql_extract
        fi
    done
fi

cd /mnt/server
chmod +x samp03svr announce 2>/dev/null || true
chown -R root:root /mnt/server

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: The name of your server (appears in server browser).

variables.name: Voice Proxy
variables.description: Enable UDP voice proxy for SampVoice (1 = Enabled, 0 = Disabled).

variables.name: Voice Port
variables.description: UDP port for voice. Must match the secondary port allocated in the panel. Only used when Voice Proxy is enabled.

variables.name: SampVoice Plugin URL
variables.description: URL to download the SampVoice plugin (.so or .tar.gz). Set to 'none' to skip.

variables.name: Install MySQL Plugin
variables.description: Automatically install MySQL plugin (1 = Yes, 0 = No).
